title: Passive with 'se' — the common alternative
grammar_notes: Pattern: se + 3rd-person verb. Verb agrees with the subject (the thing acted upon).
'Se vende coche' (singular) / 'Se venden libros' (plural). The thing sold IS the subject.
Used for general / impersonal statements: 'Aquí se habla español.' (Spanish is spoken here.) Russian: 'Здесь говорят по-испански' — same flavor.
Don't confuse with reflexive 'se': 'Se lava la cara' (he washes his face — reflexive) vs 'Se lavan los platos en la cocina' (the dishes are washed — passive).
